zh.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen是Hermann III von Gleiberg和n.n.的兒子，於大約1110年出生在德國。他與Salome von Isenburg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1147年在德國賀瑟可萊斯 吉斯吉斯希分格被列為vogt von schiffenberg。他去世於1174年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen是Hermann III von Gleiberg和n.n.的儿子，于大约1110年出生在德国。他与Salome von Isenburg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1147年在德国賀瑟可萊斯 吉斯吉斯希分格被列为vogt von schiffenberg。他去世于1174年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gleiberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Isadore.  German Manfred, Oskar.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name compound from German Blei ‘lead’ + Berg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Runte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erhard.

German: in the northwest of Germany most probably a topographic name from a field name based on run ‘mud’, which gave rise to several placenames in the Rhine-Ruhr area, for example Runten, Runtenberg, Rünthe near Hamm, Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Giessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Reinhard, Erwin.
German: possibly a habitational name from Riessen in Brandenburg.

variants.name: Riesen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Kurt.
habitational name from any of several places so named in Bavaria, Württemberg, and Tyrol.

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen was born about 1110, in Germany as the son of Hermann III von Gleiberg and n.n.. He married Salome von Isenburg. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1147, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as vogt von schiffenberg in Schiffenberg, Gießen, Giessen, Hesse, Germany. He died in 1174, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen est né environ 1110, à Allemagne, fils de Hermann III von Gleiberg et n.n.. Il a épousé Salome von Isenburg. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1147, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est vogt von schiffenberg à Schiffenberg, Gießen, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Allemagne. Il est décédé en 1174, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen wurde um 1110 in Deutschland, als Sohn von Hermann III von Gleiberg und n.n. geboren. Er hat Salome von Isenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1147, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als vogt von schiffenberg in Schiffenberg, Gießen, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb 1174 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen è nato il circa 1110 nel Germania come figlio di Hermann III von Gleiberg e n.n.. Lui sposato Salome von Isenburg. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1147, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come vogt von schiffenberg nel Schiffenberg, Gießen, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Germania. Morì nel 1174, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessenは約1110年にドイツでHermann III von Gleibergとn.n.の息子として生まれた。Salome von Isenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1147年，40歳の時，ドイツヘセンクレイス ギエssンギエssンスチフエンバーグでの職業はvogt von schiffenbergと記録されている。彼は1174年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen(은)는 대략 1110년 독일에서 Hermann III von Gleiberg(와)과 n.n.의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Salome von Isenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1147년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 독일 헤센 크레이스 기ss 기ss 시펜버그에서 vogt von schiffenberg이었다. 그는 1174년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Alemanha filho de Hermann III von Gleiberg e n.n.. Ele casou-se com Salome von Isenburg. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1147, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como vogt von schiffenberg em Schiffenberg, Gießen, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 1174, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen родился около 1110 г. в местности Германия. Его родителей звали Hermann III von Gleiberg и n.n. Он женился на женщине по имени Salome von Isenburg. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1147 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии vogt von schiffenberg в местности щиффенбирг, гиеssен, крис гиеssен, Гессен, Германия. Он умер в 1174 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Graf Wilhelm von Gleiberg und Giessen nació aproximadamente 1110, en Alemania como hijo de Hermann III von Gleiberg y n.n.. Se casó con Salome von Isenburg. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1147, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era vogt von schiffenberg en Schiffenberg, Gießen, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Alemania. Murió en 1174, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
